lesson.subtitle: Aula 18 -- At the Hotel -- Checking In
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Gabriela Paulucci | Aula 18 -- At the Hotel -- Checking In

listenings.text: Welcome to the Garden Hotel. Here is some information for our guests. Check-in is at reception on the ground floor. Please have your reservation ready. Your room key card opens your room and the lift. Breakfast is on the first floor, from seven to ten. The lift is next to reception. We hope you enjoy your stay with us.

Hi, I am Gabriela. Now I am at my hotel in London. I am at reception, and I am a little tired after my flight. The receptionist asks for my name and my reservation. I have a reservation for one double room for one week. The receptionist gives me a key card and tells me my room is on the third floor. I take the lift, and I am very happy. My trip starts now.

extra_audio.text: First, Gabriela arrives at the hotel and walks to reception. Then she says she has a reservation for a double room. After that, the receptionist asks for her name and gives her a key card. Next, the receptionist tells her the room is on the third floor. Finally, Gabriela takes the lift to her room.
